items.raw_desc: Utánfutó kiegészítő MULTIPA 161/251 ráfutófék porvédő:Rubber cap, dust cap for AL-KO type 161/251 ramp brakes. The rubber sleeve is designed to protect the pulling tube of the AL-KO 161S and 251S ramp brake from weather and dirt. We recommend replacing a cracked or otherwise damaged cuff as soon as possible. Otherwise, a rusted or dirty towing tube will quickly damage the ramp brake bushings. The rear circular hole of the cuff is fitted with a protrusion on the inside for inserting the cuff into the groove of the ramp brake sleeve (the diameter of the sleeve inside the groove is 60 mm). The front part of the cuff is specially shaped to surround the ball coupling mounted on the towing tube. There are two tabs on the side of the cuff designed to thread the cuff over the head and nut of the rear coupling bolt. The total length of the cuff in the extended working position on the ramp brake is approx. 12.5 cm. Dimensions:  56 mm (diameter 1) x 60 mm (diameter 2) x 125 mm ( length )

It is designed with healthy tooth and jaw development in mind, with minimal impact on the natural development of the oral cavity. Its top part is extra soft and easily adapts to the baby's palate, while the flat bottom leaves plenty of room for the tongue and its natural movement. The extra thin and narrow teat neck relieves the jaw and first teeth. The disc with extra large ventilation holes allows maximum airflow around the mouth, helping to reduce moisture and prevent irritation of sensitive skin. The pacifier is equipped with a light element that makes it easy to find in the dark without disturbing the baby. This car seat protection pad guarantees protection of the upholstery and makes general cleaning easier. The entire protective pad can be cleaned in the washing machine. Fits standard car seats, including those which are located at the front, just like you, that point backwards, fitted with ISOFIX. Alkalmas mosogatógépbe, mikrohullámú sütőbe, hagyományos sütőbe és fagyasztóba. Nem veszi át az étel szagát vagy ízét. items.raw_desc: Székpárna BELLATEX DITA 41/404 - steppelt, 40 × 40, rózsaszín:Prošívaný sedák Bellatex DITA 41/404 je praktický doplněk pro pohodlné sezení na židli. Díky rozměrům 40 × 40 cm se hodí na většinu standardních židlí. Podsedák Bellatex DITA je vyroben z kvalitních materiálů, které jsou odolné vůči prosezení a zajišťují dlouhou životnost. Prošívané provedení napomáhá udržet rovnoměrné rozložení výplně pro komfort při sezení. Sedák je vybaven šňůrkami na zavazování, které slouží k pevnému uchycení na židli a zabraňují sklouznutí.
